tEn: Spectral Networks and Locally Connected Networks on Graphs
tZh: 谱网络与图上的局部连接网络
sEn: We propose two generalizations of CNNs to signals on general domains: one via hierarchical clustering and another via graph Laplacian spectrum, enabling efficient deep architectures with input-size-independent parameters for low-dimensional graphs.
sZh: 我们提出了两种将CNN推广到一般域上信号的方法：一种基于层次聚类，另一种基于图拉普拉斯谱，使得在低维图上能够学习到参数数量与输入大小无关的卷积层，从而实现高效的深度架构。
absEn: Convolutional Neural Networks are extremely efficient architectures in image and audio recognition tasks, thanks to their ability to exploit the local translational invariance of signal classes over their domain. In this paper we consider possible generalizations of CNNs to signals defined on more general domains without the action of a translation group. In particular, we propose two constructions, one based upon a hierarchical clustering of the domain, and another based on the spectrum of the graph Laplacian. We show through experiments that for low-dimensional graphs it is possible to learn convolutional layers with a number of parameters independent of the input size, resulting in efficient deep architectures.
absZh: 卷积神经网络在图像和音频识别任务中非常高效，这得益于它们能够利用信号类别在其域上的局部平移不变性。在本文中，我们考虑将CNN推广到定义在更一般域上的信号，这些域没有平移群的作用。特别地，我们提出了两种构造，一种基于域的层次聚类，另一种基于图拉普拉斯谱。我们通过实验表明，对于低维图，可以学习到参数数量与输入大小无关的卷积层，从而实现高效的深度架构。

contrib.en: Proposes two generalizations of CNNs to graph-structured data: spatial and spectral constructions.
contrib.zh: 提出两种将CNN推广到图结构数据的方法：空间构建和谱构建。

contrib.en: Shows that spatial construction achieves O(n) parameters using hierarchical clustering and local receptive fields.
contrib.zh: 表明空间构建通过层次聚类和局部感受野实现O(n)参数。

contrib.en: Introduces spectral construction using graph Laplacian eigenvectors, achieving O(n) parameters per feature map.
contrib.zh: 引入基于图拉普拉斯特征向量的谱构建，每个特征图实现O(n)参数。

contrib.en: Demonstrates O(1) parameter construction via smooth spectral multipliers, enabling parameter count independent of input size.
contrib.zh: 通过平滑谱乘子展示O(1)参数构建，使参数数量与输入规模无关。

contrib.en: Validates both constructions on low-dimensional graph datasets, showing improved efficiency over fully connected networks.
contrib.zh: 在低维图数据集上验证两种构建，显示相比全连接网络效率提升。

contrib.en: Shows that smooth spectral constraints yield spatially localized filters that generalize across graph locations.
contrib.zh: 表明平滑谱约束产生空间局部化滤波器，可跨图位置泛化。

limits.en: Spatial construction lacks weight sharing across different graph locations.
limits.zh: 空间构建缺乏跨不同图位置的权重共享。

limits.en: Spectral construction requires expensive multiplication by eigenvectors and their transpose.
limits.zh: 谱构建需要昂贵的特征向量及其转置乘法。

limits.en: High-frequency eigenvectors may be noisy; spectral construction may not capture meaningful information from them.
limits.zh: 高频特征向量可能含噪声；谱构建可能无法从中捕获有意义信息。

limits.en: Naive multiscale clustering used in spatial construction does not guarantee compatibility with graph Laplacian.
limits.zh: 空间构建中使用的朴素多尺度聚类不保证与图拉普拉斯的兼容性。

limits.en: Experiments limited to low-dimensional graphs; scalability to high-dimensional or large-scale graphs not fully explored.
limits.zh: 实验限于低维图；未充分探索高维或大规模图的可扩展性。

items.en: Convolutional Neural Networks are extremely efficient architectures in image and audio recognition tasks, thanks to their ability to exploit the local translational invariance of signal classes over their domain. In this paper we consider possible generalizations of CNNs to signals defined on more general domains without the action of a translation group. In particular, we propose two constructions, one based upon a hierarchical clustering of the domain, and another based on the spectrum of the graph Laplacian. We show through experiments that for low-dimensional graphs it is possible to learn convolutional layers with a number of parameters independent of the input size, resulting in efficient deep architectures.
items.zh: 卷积神经网络在图像和音频识别任务中极为高效，这得益于它们能够利用信号类别在其域上的局部平移不变性。本文考虑将CNN推广到定义在更一般域上的信号，这些域没有平移群的作用。具体而言，我们提出了两种构造：一种基于域的层次聚类，另一种基于图拉普拉斯谱。实验表明，对于低维图，可以学习到参数数量与输入大小无关的卷积层，从而实现高效的深度架构。

items.en: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been extremely succesful in machine learning problems where the coordinates of the underlying data representation have a grid structure (in 1, 2 and 3 dimensions), and the data to be studied in those coordinates has translational equivariance/invariance with respect to this grid. Speech [11], images [14, 20, 22] or video [23, 18] are prominent examples that fall into this category.
items.zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在底层数据表示的坐标具有网格结构（1维、2维和3维）且数据在这些坐标上具有相对于网格的平移等变性/不变性的机器学习问题中非常成功。语音[11]、图像[14, 20, 22]或视频[23, 18]是此类问题的典型例子。

items.en: On a regular grid, a CNN is able to exploit several structures that play nicely together to greatly reduce the number of parameters in the system:
items.zh: 在规则网格上，CNN能够利用多种协同作用的结构，从而大幅减少系统中的参数数量：

items.en: The translation structure, allowing the use of filters instead of generic linear maps and hence weight sharing.
items.zh: 平移结构，允许使用滤波器而非通用线性映射，从而实现权重共享。

items.en: The metric on the grid, allowing compactly supported filters, whose support is typically much smaller than the size of the input signals.
items.zh: 网格上的度量，允许使用紧支撑滤波器，其支撑通常远小于输入信号的大小。

items.en: The multiscale dyadic clustering of the grid, allowing subsampling, implemented through stride convolutions and pooling.
items.zh: 网格的多尺度二进聚类，允许通过步长卷积和池化实现子采样。

items.en: If there are n𝑛n input coordinates on a grid in d𝑑d dimensions, a fully connected layer with m𝑚m outputs requires n⋅m⋅𝑛𝑚n\cdot m parameters, which in typical operating regimes amounts to a complexity of O​(n2)𝑂superscript𝑛2O(n^{2}) parameters. Using arbitrary filters instead of generic fully connected layers reduces the complexity to O​(n)𝑂𝑛O(n) parameters per feature map, as does using the metric structure by building a “locally connected” net [8, 17]. Using the two together gives O​(k⋅S)𝑂⋅𝑘𝑆O(k\cdot S) parameters, where k𝑘k is the number of feature maps and S𝑆S is the support of the filters, and as a result the learning complexity is independent of n𝑛n. Finally, using the multiscale dyadic clustering allows each succesive layer to use a factor of 2dsuperscript2𝑑2^{d} less (spatial) coordinates per filter.
items.zh: 如果d维网格上有n个输入坐标，则具有m个输出的全连接层需要n·m个参数，在典型操作模式下复杂度为O(n²)个参数。使用任意滤波器而非通用全连接层可将复杂度降低到每个特征图O(n)个参数，通过构建“局部连接”网络[8, 17]利用度量结构也是如此。两者结合使用可得到O(k·S)个参数，其中k是特征图数量，S是滤波器的支撑，因此学习复杂度与n无关。最后，使用多尺度二进聚类允许每个后续层每个滤波器使用少2^d倍的（空间）坐标。

items.en: In many contexts, however, one may be faced with data defined over coordinates which lack some, or all, of the above geometrical properties. For instance, data defined on 3-D meshes, such as surface tension or temperature, measurements from a network of meteorological stations, or data coming from social networks or collaborative filtering, are all examples of structured inputs on which one cannot apply standard convolutional networks. Another relevant example is the intermediate representation arising from deep neural networks. Although the spatial convolutional structure can be exploited at several layers, typical CNN architectures do not assume any geometry in the “feature” dimension, resulting in 4-D tensors which are only convolutional along their spatial coordinates.
items.zh: 然而，在许多情况下，数据可能定义在缺乏上述部分或全部几何性质的坐标上。例如，定义在3D网格上的数据（如表面张力或温度）、来自气象站网络的测量数据，或来自社交网络或协同过滤的数据，都是无法应用标准卷积网络的结构化输入示例。另一个相关示例是深度神经网络产生的中间表示。尽管空间卷积结构可以在多个层中利用，但典型的CNN架构在“特征”维度上不假设任何几何结构，导致4D张量仅在其空间坐标上是卷积的。

items.en: Graphs offer a natural framework to generalize the low-dimensional grid structure, and by extension the notion of convolution. In this work, we will discuss constructions of deep neural networks on graphs other than regular grids. We propose two different constructions. In the first one, we show that one can extend properties (2) and (3) to general graphs, and use them to define “locally” connected and pooling layers, which require O​(n)𝑂𝑛O(n) parameters instead of O​(n2)𝑂superscript𝑛2O(n^{2}). We term this the spatial construction. The other construction, which we call spectral construction, draws on the properties of convolutions in the Fourier domain. In ℝdsuperscriptℝ𝑑\mathbb{R}^{d}, convolutions are linear operators diagonalised by the Fourier basis exp⁡(i​ω⋅t)⋅𝑖𝜔𝑡\exp(i\omega\cdot t), ω,t∈ℝd𝜔𝑡superscriptℝ𝑑\omega,\,t\,\in\mathbb{R}^{d}. One may then extend convolutions to general graphs by finding the corresponding “Fourier” basis. This equivalence is given through the graph Laplacian, an operator which provides an harmonic analysis on the graphs [1]. The spectral construction needs at most O​(n)𝑂𝑛O(n) paramters per feature map, and also enables a construction where the number of parameters is independent of the input dimension n𝑛n. These constructions allow efficient forward propagation and can be applied to datasets with very large number of coordinates.
items.zh: 图提供了一个自然框架来推广低维网格结构，进而推广卷积的概念。在本文中，我们将讨论在非规则网格的图上构建深度神经网络。我们提出两种不同的构造。在第一种构造中，我们展示了可以将性质（2）和（3）推广到一般图，并用它们定义“局部”连接层和池化层，这些层需要O(n)个参数而非O(n²)个参数。我们称之为空间构造。另一种构造称为谱构造，利用了傅里叶域中卷积的性质。在ℝᵈ中，卷积是由傅里叶基exp(iω·t)（ω, t ∈ ℝᵈ）对角化的线性算子。然后，通过找到相应的“傅里叶”基，可以将卷积推广到一般图。这种等价性通过图拉普拉斯算子给出，该算子提供了图上的调和分析[1]。谱构造每个特征图最多需要O(n)个参数，并且还允许构造参数数量与输入维度n无关。这些构造允许高效的前向传播，并可应用于具有大量坐标的数据集。

items.en: Our main contributions are summarized as follows:
items.zh: 我们的主要贡献总结如下：

items.en: We show that from a weak geometric structure in the input domain it is possible to obtain efficient architectures using O​(n)𝑂𝑛O(n) parameters, that we validate on low-dimensional graph datasets.
items.zh: 我们展示了从输入域中的弱几何结构可以获得使用O(n)个参数的高效架构，并在低维图数据集上进行了验证。

items.en: We introduce a construction using O​(1)𝑂1O(1) parameters which we empirically verify, and we discuss its connections with an harmonic analysis problem on graphs.
items.zh: 我们引入了一种使用O(1)个参数的构造，并进行了实证验证，同时讨论了其与图上调和分析问题的联系。

items.en: The most immediate generalisation of CNN to general graphs is to consider multiscale, hierarchical, local receptive fields, as suggested in [3]. For that purpose, the grid will be replaced by a weighted graph G=(Ω,W)𝐺Ω𝑊G=(\Omega,W), where ΩΩ\Omega is a discrete set of size m𝑚m and W𝑊W is a m×m𝑚𝑚m\times m symmetric and nonnegative matrix.
items.zh: 将CNN推广到一般图的最直接方法是考虑多尺度、层次化的局部感受野，如[3]所建议。为此，网格将被加权图G=(Ω, W)取代，其中Ω是大小为m的离散集合，W是m×m的对称非负矩阵。

items.en: The notion of locality can be generalized easily in the context of a graph. Indeed, the weights in a graph determine a notion of locality. For example, a straightforward way to define neighborhoods on W𝑊W is to set a threshold δ>0𝛿0\delta>0 and take neighborhoods
items.zh: 局部性的概念可以在图的上下文中轻松推广。实际上，图中的权重决定了局部性的概念。例如，在W上定义邻域的一种直接方法是设置阈值δ>0并取邻域。

items.en: We can restrict attention to sparse “filters” with receptive fields given by these neighborhoods to get locally connected networks, thus reducing the number of parameters in a filter layer to O​(S⋅n)𝑂⋅𝑆𝑛O(S\cdot n), where S𝑆S is the average neighborhood size.
items.zh: 我们可以将注意力限制在稀疏“滤波器”上，其感受野由这些邻域给出，从而得到局部连接网络，从而将滤波器层中的参数数量减少到O(S·n)，其中S是平均邻域大小。

items.en: CNNs reduce the size of the grid via pooling and subsampling layers. These layers are possible because of the natural multiscale clustering of the grid: they input all the feature maps over a cluster, and output a single feature for that cluster. On the grid, the dyadic clustering behaves nicely with respect to the metric and the Laplacian (and so with the translation structure). There is a large literature on forming multiscale clusterings on graphs, see for example [16, 25, 6, 13]. Finding multiscale clusterings that are provably guaranteed to behave well w.r.t. Laplacian on the graph is still an open area of research. In this work we will use a naive agglomerative method.
items.zh: CNN通过池化和子采样层减小网格大小。这些层之所以可能，是因为网格的自然多尺度聚类：它们输入一个聚类上的所有特征图，并输出该聚类的单个特征。在网格上，二进聚类在度量和拉普拉斯算子（因此与平移结构）方面表现良好。关于在图上的多尺度聚类形成有大量文献，例如[16, 25, 6, 13]。找到能够保证相对于图拉普拉斯算子表现良好的多尺度聚类仍然是一个开放的研究领域。在本文中，我们将使用一种简单的凝聚方法。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Undirected Graph G=(Ω0,W)𝐺subscriptΩ0𝑊G=(\Omega_{0},W) with two levels of clustering. The original points are drawn in gray.
items.capZh: 图1：无向图G=(Ω₀, W)具有两个聚类层次。原始点以灰色绘制。

items.en: The spatial construction starts with a multiscale clustering of the graph, similarly as in [3] We consider K𝐾K scales. We set Ω0=ΩsubscriptΩ0Ω\Omega_{0}=\Omega, and for each k=1​…​K𝑘1…𝐾k=1\dots K, we define ΩksubscriptΩ𝑘\Omega_{k}, a partition of Ωk−1subscriptΩ𝑘1\Omega_{k-1} into dksubscript𝑑𝑘d_{k} clusters; and a collection of neighborhoods around each element of Ωk−1subscriptΩ𝑘1\Omega_{k-1}:
items.zh: 空间构造从图的多尺度聚类开始，类似于[3]。我们考虑K个尺度。设Ω₀=Ω，对于每个k=1…K，定义Ωₖ为Ωₖ₋₁的一个划分为dₖ个聚类；以及Ωₖ₋₁中每个元素周围的邻域集合：

items.en: With these in hand, we can now define the k𝑘k-th layer of the network. We assume without loss of generality that the input signal is a real signal defined in Ω0subscriptΩ0\Omega_{0}, and we denote by fksubscript𝑓𝑘f_{k} the number of “filters” created at each layer k𝑘k. Each layer of the network will transform a fk−1subscript𝑓𝑘1f_{k-1}-dimensional signal indexed by Ωk−1subscriptΩ𝑘1\Omega_{k-1} into a fksubscript𝑓𝑘f_{k}-dimensional signal indexed by ΩksubscriptΩ𝑘\Omega_{k}, thus trading-off spatial resolution with newly created feature coordinates.
items.zh: 有了这些，我们现在可以定义网络的第k层。不失一般性，我们假设输入信号是定义在Ω₀上的实信号，并记fₖ为每层k创建的“滤波器”数量。网络的每一层将把由Ωₖ₋₁索引的fₖ₋₁维信号转换为由Ωₖ索引的fₖ维信号，从而在空间分辨率与新创建的特征坐标之间进行权衡。

items.en: More formally, if xk=(xk,i;i=1​…​fk−1)subscript𝑥𝑘subscript𝑥𝑘𝑖𝑖1…subscript𝑓𝑘1x_{k}=(x_{k,i}\,\,;\,i=1\dots f_{k-1}) is the dk−1×fk−1subscript𝑑𝑘1subscript𝑓𝑘1d_{k-1}\times f_{k-1} is the input to layer k𝑘k, its the output xk+1subscript𝑥𝑘1x_{k+1} is defined as
items.zh: 更正式地，如果xₖ=(xₖ,ᵢ; i=1…fₖ₋₁)是大小为dₖ₋₁×fₖ₋₁的输入到第k层，则其输出xₖ₊₁定义为

items.en: where Fk,i,jsubscript𝐹𝑘𝑖𝑗F_{k,i,j} is a dk−1×dk−1subscript𝑑𝑘1subscript𝑑𝑘1d_{k-1}\times d_{k-1} sparse matrix with nonzero entries in the locations given by 𝒩ksubscript𝒩𝑘\mathcal{N}_{k}, and Lksubscript𝐿𝑘L_{k} outputs the result of a pooling operation over each cluster in ΩksubscriptΩ𝑘\Omega_{k}. This construcion is illustrated in Figure 2.
items.zh: 其中 F_{k,i,j} 是一个 d_{k-1} × d_{k-1} 的稀疏矩阵，非零项位于由 N_k 给定的位置，而 L_k 输出对 Ω_k 中每个簇进行池化操作的结果。该构造如图 2 所示。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Spatial Construction as described by (2.1), with K=2𝐾2K=2. For illustration purposes, the pooling operation is assimilated with the filtering stage. Each layer of the transformation loses spatial resolution but increases the number of filters.
items.capZh: 图 2：如 (2.1) 所述的空间构造，其中 K=2。为便于说明，池化操作被合并到滤波阶段。变换的每一层都会损失空间分辨率，但会增加滤波器数量。

items.zh: 在当前代码中，为了构建 Ω_k 和 N_k，我们使用以下构造：

items.en: and ΩksubscriptΩ𝑘\Omega_{k} is found as an ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon covering for Wksubscript𝑊𝑘W_{k} 111An ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon-covering of a set ΩΩ\Omega using a similarity kernel K𝐾K is a partition 𝒫={𝒫1,…,𝒫n}𝒫subscript𝒫1…subscript𝒫𝑛\mathcal{P}=\{\mathcal{P}_{1},\dots,\mathcal{P}_{n}\} such that supnsupx,x′∈𝒫nK​(x,x′)≥ϵsubscriptsupremum𝑛subscriptsupremum𝑥superscript𝑥′subscript𝒫𝑛𝐾𝑥superscript𝑥′italic-ϵ\sup_{n}\sup_{x,x^{\prime}\in\mathcal{P}_{n}}K(x,x^{\prime})\geq\epsilon.. This is just one amongst many strategies to perform hierarchicial agglomerative clustering. For a larger account of the problem, we refer the reader to [10].
items.zh: 并且 Ω_k 被定义为 W_k 的一个 ε 覆盖¹¹一个集合 Ω 使用相似性核 K 的 ε 覆盖是一个划分 P={P_1,…,P_n}，使得 sup_n sup_{x,x'∈P_n} K(x,x') ≥ ε。这只是执行层次凝聚聚类的众多策略之一。关于该问题的更全面论述，我们建议读者参考文献 [10]。

items.en: If Sksubscript𝑆𝑘S_{k} is the average support of the neighborhoods 𝒩ksubscript𝒩𝑘\mathcal{N}_{k}, we verify from (2.1) that the number of parameters to learn at layer k𝑘k is
items.zh: 如果 S_k 是邻域 N_k 的平均支撑大小，则从 (2.1) 可验证第 k 层需要学习的参数数量为

items.en: In practice, we have Sk⋅|Ωk|≈α⋅|Ωk−1|⋅subscript𝑆𝑘subscriptΩ𝑘⋅𝛼subscriptΩ𝑘1S_{k}\cdot|\Omega_{k}|\approx\alpha\cdot|\Omega_{k-1}|, where α𝛼\alpha is the oversampling factor, typically α∈(1,4)𝛼14\alpha\in(1,4).
items.zh: 在实践中，我们有 S_k · |Ω_k| ≈ α · |Ω_{k-1}|，其中 α 是过采样因子，通常 α ∈ (1,4)。

items.en: The spatial construction might appear naïve, but it has the advantage that it requires relatively weak regularity assumptions on the graph. Graphs having low intrinsic dimension have localized neighborhoods, even if no nice global embedding exists. However, under this construction there is no easy way to induce weight sharing across different locations of the graph. One possible option is to consider a global embedding of the graph into a low dimensional space, which is rare in practice for high-dimensional data.
items.zh: 空间构造可能看起来简单，但其优点在于对图的规则性要求相对较弱。具有低内在维度的图具有局部化的邻域，即使不存在良好的全局嵌入。然而，在这种构造下，没有简单的方法在图的不同位置之间引入权重共享。一种可能的选项是考虑将图全局嵌入到低维空间中，但这在高维数据中很少见。

items.en: The global structure of the graph can be exploited with the spectrum of its graph-Laplacian to generalize the convolution operator.
items.zh: 图的全局结构可以利用其图拉普拉斯算子的谱来推广卷积算子。

items.en: The combinatorial Laplacian L=D−W𝐿𝐷𝑊L=D-W or graph Laplacian ℒ=I−D−1/2​W​D−1/2ℒ𝐼superscript𝐷12𝑊superscript𝐷12\mathcal{L}=I-D^{-1/2}WD^{-1/2} are generalizations of the Laplacian on the grid; and frequency and smoothness relative to W𝑊W are interrelated through these operators [2, 25]. For simplicity, here we use the combinatorial Laplacian. If x𝑥x is an m𝑚m-dimensional vector, a natural definition of the smoothness functional ‖∇x‖W2superscriptsubscriptnorm∇𝑥𝑊2||\nabla x||_{W}^{2} at a node i𝑖i is
items.zh: 组合拉普拉斯算子 L=D-W 或图拉普拉斯算子 L=I-D^{-1/2}WD^{-1/2} 是网格上拉普拉斯算子的推广；频率和相对于 W 的光滑性通过这些算子相互关联 [2, 25]。为简单起见，这里我们使用组合拉普拉斯算子。如果 x 是一个 m 维向量，则节点 i 处光滑性泛函 ||∇x||_W^2 的自然定义为

items.en: With this definition, the smoothest vector is a constant:
items.zh: 根据该定义，最光滑的向量是常向量：

items.en: is an eigenvector of L𝐿L, and the eigenvalues λisubscript𝜆𝑖\lambda_{i} allow the smoothness of a vector x𝑥x to be read off from the coefficients of x𝑥x in [v0,…​vm−1]subscript𝑣0…subscript𝑣𝑚1[v_{0},...v_{m-1}], equivalently as the Fourier coefficients of a signal defined in a grid. Thus, just an in the case of the grid, where the eigenvectors of the Laplacian are the Fourier vectors, diagonal operators on the spectrum of the Laplacian modulate the smoothness of their operands. Moreover, using these diagonal operators reduces the number of parameters of a filter from m2superscript𝑚2m^{2} to m𝑚m.
items.zh: 是 L 的特征向量，特征值 λ_i 允许从 x 在 [v_0,…,v_{m-1}] 中的系数读出向量 x 的光滑性，这等价于网格上定义信号的傅里叶系数。因此，正如网格的情况（其中拉普拉斯算子的特征向量是傅里叶向量），拉普拉斯算子谱上的对角算子调节其操作数的光滑性。此外，使用这些对角算子将滤波器的参数数量从 m^2 减少到 m。

items.en: These three structures above are all tied together through the Laplacian operator on the d𝑑d-dimensional grid Δ​x=∑i=1d∂2x∂ui2Δ𝑥superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑑superscript2𝑥superscriptsubscript𝑢𝑖2\Delta x=\sum_{i=1}^{d}\frac{\partial^{2}x}{\partial u_{i}^{2}} :
items.zh: 上述三种结构都通过 d 维网格上的拉普拉斯算子 Δx=∑_{i=1}^d ∂²x/∂u_i² 联系在一起：

items.en: Filters are multipliers on the eigenvalues of the Laplacian ΔΔ\Delta.
items.zh: 滤波器是拉普拉斯算子 Δ 特征值上的乘子。

items.en: Functions that are smooth relative to the grid metric have coefficients with quick decay in the basis of eigenvectors of ΔΔ\Delta.
items.zh: 相对于网格度量光滑的函数在 Δ 的特征向量基中具有快速衰减的系数。

items.en: The eigenvectors of the subsampled Laplacian are the low frequency eigenvectors of ΔΔ\Delta.
items.zh: 子采样拉普拉斯算子的特征向量是 Δ 的低频特征向量。

full.sec: 3.2 Extending Convolutions via the Laplacian Spectrum
full.secZh: 3.2 通过拉普拉斯谱扩展卷积

items.en: As in section 2.3, let W𝑊W be a weighted graph with index set denoted by ΩΩ\Omega, and let V𝑉V be the eigenvectors of the graph Laplacian L𝐿L, ordered by eigenvalue. Given a weighted graph, we can try to generalize a convolutional net by operating on the spectrum of the weights, given by the eigenvectors of its graph Laplacian.
items.zh: 如第 2.3 节所述，令 W 是一个加权图，其索引集记为 Ω，V 是图拉普拉斯算子 L 的特征向量，按特征值排序。给定一个加权图，我们可以尝试通过在图拉普拉斯算子特征值谱上操作来推广卷积网络。

items.en: For simplicity, let us first describe a construction where each layer k=1​…​K𝑘1…𝐾k=1\dots K transforms an input vector xksubscript𝑥𝑘x_{k} of size |Ω|×fk−1Ωsubscript𝑓𝑘1|\Omega|\times f_{k-1} into an output xk+1subscript𝑥𝑘1x_{k+1} of dimensions |Ω|×fkΩsubscript𝑓𝑘|\Omega|\times f_{k}, that is, without spatial subsampling:
items.zh: 为简单起见，我们首先描述一种构造，其中每一层 k=1…K 将大小为 |Ω|×f_{k-1} 的输入向量 x_k 转换为维度为 |Ω|×f_k 的输出 x_{k+1}，即没有空间子采样：

items.en: where Fk,i,jsubscript𝐹𝑘𝑖𝑗F_{k,i,j} is a diagonal matrix and, as before, hℎh is a real valued nonlinearity.
items.zh: 其中 F_{k,i,j} 是对角矩阵，并且如前所述，h 是实值非线性函数。

items.en: Often, only the first d𝑑d eigenvectors of the Laplacian are useful in practice, which carry the smooth geometry of the graph. The cutoff frequency d𝑑d depends upon the intrinsic regularity of the graph and also the sample size. In that case, we can replace in (3.2) V𝑉V by Vdsubscript𝑉𝑑V_{d}, obtained by keeping the first d𝑑d columns of V𝑉V.
items.zh: 通常，在实践中只有拉普拉斯算子的前 d 个特征向量有用，它们承载了图的光滑几何结构。截止频率 d 取决于图的内在规则性以及样本大小。在这种情况下，我们可以在 (3.2) 中用 V_d 替换 V，V_d 通过保留 V 的前 d 列得到。

items.en: If the graph has an underlying group invariance this construction can discover it; the best example being the standard CNN; see 3.3. However, in many cases the graph does not have a group structure, or the group structure does not commute with the Laplacian, and so we cannot think of each filter as passing a template across ΩΩ\Omega and recording the correlation of the template with that location. ΩΩ\Omega may not be homogenous in a way that allows this to make sense, as we shall see in the example from Section 5.1.
items.zh: 如果图具有潜在的群不变性，这种构造可以发现它；最好的例子是标准 CNN；见 3.3。然而，在许多情况下，图没有群结构，或者群结构与拉普拉斯算子不交换，因此我们不能将每个滤波器视为在 Ω 上传递模板并记录模板与该位置的相关性。Ω 可能不是均匀的，以至于这种方式没有意义，正如我们在第 5.1 节的例子中将会看到的。

items.en: Assuming only d𝑑d eigenvectors of the Laplacian are kept, equation (3.2) shows that each layer requires fk−1⋅fk⋅d=O​(|Ω|)⋅subscript𝑓𝑘1subscript𝑓𝑘𝑑𝑂Ωf_{k-1}\cdot f_{k}\cdot d=O(|\Omega|) paramters to train. We shall see in section 3.4 how the global and local regularity of the graph can be combined to produce layers with O​(1)𝑂1O(1) parameters, i.e. such that the number of learnable parameters does not depend upon the size of the input.
items.zh: 假设只保留拉普拉斯矩阵的 d 个特征向量，方程 (3.2) 表明每层需要训练 f_{k-1}·f_k·d = O(|Ω|) 个参数。我们将在第 3.4 节看到，如何结合图的全局和局部正则性来产生具有 O(1) 个参数的层，即可学习参数的数量不依赖于输入大小。

items.en: This construction can suffer from the fact that most graphs have meaningful eigenvectors only for the very top of the spectrum. Even when the individual high frequency eigenvectors are not meaningful, a cohort of high frequency eigenvectors may contain meaningful information. However this construction may not be able to access this information because it is nearly diagonal at the highest frequencies.
items.zh: 这种构造可能存在问题，因为大多数图仅在频谱的顶端具有有意义的特征向量。即使单个高频特征向量没有意义，一群高频特征向量也可能包含有意义的信息。然而，这种构造可能无法访问这些信息，因为在最高频率处它几乎是角化的。

items.en: Finally, it is not obvious how to do either the forwardprop or the backprop efficiently while applying the nonlinearity on the space side, as we have to make the expensive multiplications by V𝑉V and VTsuperscript𝑉𝑇V^{T}; and it is not obvious how to do standard nonlinearities on the spectral side. However, see 4.1.
items.zh: 最后，如何在空间侧应用非线性时高效地进行前向传播或反向传播并不明显，因为我们必须进行昂贵的 V 和 V^T 乘法；而在频谱侧进行标准非线性操作也不明显。不过，参见 4.1。

items.en: A simple, and in some sense universal, choice of weight matrix in this construction is the covariance of the data. Let X=(xk)k𝑋subscriptsubscript𝑥𝑘𝑘X=(x_{k})_{k} be the input data distribution, with xk∈ℝnsubscript𝑥𝑘superscriptℝ𝑛x_{k}\in\mathbb{R}^{n}. If each coordinate j=1​…​n𝑗1…𝑛j=1\dots n has the same variance,
items.zh: 在这种构造中，一个简单且在某种意义上是通用的权重矩阵选择是数据的协方差。令 X = (x_k)_k 为输入数据分布，其中 x_k ∈ ℝ^n。如果每个坐标 j = 1…n 具有相同的方差，

items.en: then diagonal operators on the Laplacian simply scale the principal components of X𝑋X. While this may seem trivial, it is well known that the principal components of the set of images of a fixed size are (experimentally) correspond to the Discrete Cosine Transform basis, organized by frequency. This can be explained by noticing that images are translation invariant, and hence the covariance operator
items.zh: 那么拉普拉斯矩阵上的对角算子只是缩放 X 的主成分。虽然这看起来微不足道，但众所周知，固定大小图像集的主成分（实验上）对应于按频率组织的离散余弦变换基。这可以通过注意到图像是平移不变的来解释，因此协方差算子

items.en: satisfies Σ​(j,j′)=Σ​(j−j′)Σ𝑗superscript𝑗′Σ𝑗superscript𝑗′\Sigma(j,j^{\prime})=\Sigma(j-j^{\prime}), hence it is diagonalized by the Fourier basis. Moreover, it is well known that natural images exhibit a power spectrum E​(|x^​(ξ)|2)∼ξ−2similar-to𝐸superscript^𝑥𝜉2superscript𝜉2E(|\widehat{x}(\xi)|^{2})\sim\xi^{-2}, since nearby pixels are more correlated than far away pixels. It results that principal components of the covariance are essentially ordered from low to high frequencies, which is consistent with the standard group structure of the Fourier basis.
items.zh: 满足 Σ(j, j') = Σ(j - j')，因此它由傅里叶基对角化。此外，众所周知，自然图像表现出功率谱 E(|x̂(ξ)|²) ∼ ξ^{-2}，因为相邻像素比远处像素更相关。结果是协方差的主成分基本上按从低频到高频的顺序排列，这与傅里叶基的标准群结构一致。

items.en: The upshot is that, when applied to natural images, the construction in 3.2 using the covariance as the similarity kernel recovers a standard convolutional network, without any prior knowledge. Indeed, the linear operators V​Fi,j​VT𝑉subscript𝐹𝑖𝑗superscript𝑉𝑇VF_{i,j}V^{T} from Eq (3.2) are by the previous argument diagonal in the Fourier basis, hence translation invariant, hence “classic” convolutions. Moreover, Section 4.1 explains how spatial subsampling can also be obtained via dropping the last part of the spectrum of the Laplacian, leading to max-pooling, and ultimately to deep convolutonal networks.
items.zh: 结果是，当应用于自然图像时，使用协方差作为相似性核的 3.2 节构造恢复了一个标准的卷积网络，而无需任何先验知识。实际上，方程 (3.2) 中的线性算子 V F_{i,j} V^T 根据前面的论证在傅里叶基下是对角的，因此是平移不变的，即“经典”卷积。此外，第 4.1 节解释了如何通过丢弃拉普拉斯矩阵频谱的最后部分来获得空间子采样，从而得到最大池化，并最终得到深度卷积网络。

full.sec: 3.4 O​(1)𝑂1O(1) construction with smooth spectral multipliers
full.secZh: 3.4 使用平滑谱乘子的O(1)构造

items.en: In the standard grid, we do not need a parameter for each Fourier function because the filters are compactly supported in space, but in (3.2), each filter requires one parameter for each eigenvector on which it acts. Even if the filters were compactly supported in space in this construction, we still would not get less than O​(n)𝑂𝑛O(n) parameters per filter because the spatial response would be different at each location.
items.zh: 在标准网格中，我们不需要为每个傅里叶函数设置一个参数，因为滤波器在空间上是紧支撑的，但在 (3.2) 中，每个滤波器需要为其作用的每个特征向量设置一个参数。即使在这种构造中滤波器在空间上是紧支撑的，我们仍然会得到每个滤波器不少于 O(n) 个参数，因为空间响应在每个位置都会不同。

items.en: One possibility for getting around this is to generalize the duality of the grid. On the Euclidian grid, the decay of a function in the spatial domain is translated into smoothness in the Fourier domain, and viceversa. It results that a funtion x𝑥x which is spatially localized has a smooth frequency response x^=VT​x^𝑥superscript𝑉𝑇𝑥\hat{x}=V^{T}x. In that case, the eigenvectors of the Laplacian can be thought of as being arranged on a grid isomorphic to the original spatial grid.
items.zh: 解决这个问题的一种可能性是推广网格的对偶性。在欧几里得网格上，函数在空间域的衰减转化为傅里叶域的光滑性，反之亦然。结果是，空间局部化的函数 x 具有光滑的频率响应 x̂ = V^T x。在这种情况下，拉普拉斯矩阵的特征向量可以被认为排列在与原始空间网格同构的网格上。

items.en: This suggests that, in order to learn a layer in which features will be not only shared across locations but also well localized in the original domain, one can learn spectral multipliers which are smooth. Smoothness can be prescribed by learning only a subsampled set of frequency multipliers and using an interpolation kernel to obtain the rest, such as cubic splines. However, the notion of smoothness requires a geometry in the domain of spectral coordinates, which can be obtained by defining a dual graph W~~𝑊\widetilde{W} as shown by (3.1). As previously discussed, on regular grids this geometry is given by the notion of frequency, but this cannot be directly generalized to other graphs.
items.zh: 这表明，为了学习一个层，其中特征不仅跨位置共享，而且在原始域中良好局部化，可以学习光滑的频谱乘子。光滑性可以通过仅学习一个子采样的频率乘子集并使用插值核（如三次样条）来获得其余部分来规定。然而，光滑性的概念需要频谱坐标域中的几何结构，这可以通过定义对偶图 W̃ 来获得，如 (3.1) 所示。如前所述，在规则网格上，这种几何结构由频率的概念给出，但这不能直接推广到其他图。

items.en: A particularly simple and navie choice consists in choosing a 111-dimensional arrangement, obtained by ordering the eigenvectors according to their eigenvalues. In this setting, the diagonal of each filter Fk,i,jsubscript𝐹𝑘𝑖𝑗F_{k,i,j} (of size at most |Ω|)|\Omega|) is parametrized by
items.zh: 一个特别简单且天真的选择是选择一维排列，通过按特征值对特征向量排序得到。在这种设置中，每个滤波器 F_{k,i,j} 的对角线（大小最多为 |Ω|）由以下参数化：

items.en: where 𝒦𝒦\mathcal{K} is a d×qk𝑑subscript𝑞𝑘d\times q_{k} fixed cubic spline kernel and αk,i,jsubscript𝛼𝑘𝑖𝑗\alpha_{k,i,j} are the qksubscript𝑞𝑘q_{k} spline coefficients. If one seeks to have filters with constant spatial support (ie, whose support is independent of the input size |Ω|Ω|\Omega|), it follows that one can choose a sampling step α∼|Ω|similar-to𝛼Ω\alpha\sim|\Omega| in the spectral domain, which results in a constant number qk∼|Ω|⋅α−1=O​(1)similar-tosubscript𝑞𝑘⋅Ωsuperscript𝛼1𝑂1q_{k}\sim|\Omega|\cdot\alpha^{-1}=O(1) of coefficients αk,i,jsubscript𝛼𝑘𝑖𝑗\alpha_{k,i,j} per filter.
items.zh: 其中 K 是一个 d × q_k 的固定三次样条核，α_{k,i,j} 是 q_k 个样条系数。如果希望滤波器具有恒定的空间支撑（即支撑大小与输入大小 |Ω| 无关），那么可以在频谱域中选择采样步长 α ∼ |Ω|，这导致每个滤波器的系数 α_{k,i,j} 的数量为常数 q_k ∼ |Ω|·α^{-1} = O(1)。

items.en: Although results from section 5 seem to indicate that the 1-D arrangement given by the spectrum of the Laplacian is efficient at creating spatially localized filters, a fundamental question is how to define a dual graph capturing the geometry of spectral coordinates. A possible algorithmic stategy is to consider an input distribution X=(xk)k𝑋subscriptsubscript𝑥𝑘𝑘X=(x_{k})_{k} consisting on spatially localized signals and to construct a dual graph W^^𝑊\widehat{W} by measuring the similarity of in the spectral domain: X^=VT​X^𝑋superscript𝑉𝑇𝑋\widehat{X}=V^{T}X. The similarity could be measured for instance with E((|x^|−E(|x^)|))T(|x^|−E(|x^|))E((|\hat{x}|-E(|\hat{x})|))^{T}(|\hat{x}|-E(|\hat{x}|)).
items.zh: 尽管第 5 节的结果似乎表明由拉普拉斯矩阵频谱给出的一维排列在创建空间局部化滤波器方面是有效的，但一个基本问题是如何定义捕捉频谱坐标几何结构的对偶图。一种可能的算法策略是考虑由空间局部化信号组成的输入分布 X = (x_k)_k，并通过测量频谱域中的相似性来构造对偶图 Ŵ：X̂ = V^T X。相似性可以例如通过 E((|x̂| - E(|x̂|)))^T (|x̂| - E(|x̂|)) 来测量。

items.en: There is a large literature on building wavelets on graphs, see for example [21, 7, 4, 5, 9]. A wavelet basis on a grid, in the language of neural networks, is a linear autoencoder with certain provable regularity properties (in particular, when encoding various classes of smooth functions, sparsity is guaranteed). The forward propagation in a classical wavelet transform strongly resembles the forward propagation in a neural network, except that there is only one filter map at each layer (and it is usually the same filter at each layer), and the output of each layer is kept, rather than just the output of the final layer. Classically, the filter is not learned, but constructed to facilitate the regularity proofs.
items.zh: 关于在图上的小波构造有大量文献，例如 [21, 7, 4, 5, 9]。在网格上的小波基，用神经网络的语言来说，是一个具有某些可证明正则性性质的线性自编码器（特别是在编码各种光滑函数类时，稀疏性得到保证）。经典小波变换中的前向传播与神经网络中的前向传播非常相似，除了每层只有一个滤波器映射（并且通常每层使用相同的滤波器），并且每层的输出都被保留，而不仅仅是最后一层的输出。经典上，滤波器不是学习的，而是为了便于正则性证明而构造的。

items.en: In the graph case, the goal is the same; except that the smoothness on the grid is replaced by smoothness on the graph. As in the classical case, most works have tried to construct the wavelets explicitly (that is, without learning), based on the graph, so that the corresponding autencoder has the correct sparsity properties. In this work, and the recent work [21], the “filters” are constrained by construction to have some of the regularity properties of wavelets, but are also trained so that they are appropriate for a task separate from (but perhaps related to) the smoothness on the graph. Whereas [21] still builds a (sparse) linear autoencoder that keeps the basic wavelet transform setup, this work focuses on nonlinear constructions; and in particular, tries to build analogues of CNN’s.
items.zh: 在图的情况下，目标是相同的；只是网格上的光滑性被图上的光滑性取代。与经典情况一样，大多数工作试图基于图显式地构造小波（即无需学习），以便相应的自编码器具有正确的稀疏性性质。在本工作以及近期工作 [21] 中，“滤波器”通过构造被约束为具有小波的一些正则性性质，但也经过训练以使其适用于与图光滑性分离（但可能相关）的任务。而 [21] 仍然构建了一个（稀疏的）线性自编码器，保留了基本的小波变换设置，本工作则侧重于非线性构造；特别是，试图构建 CNN 的类似物。

items.en: Another line of work which is rellevant to the present work is that of discovering grid topologies from data. In [19], the authors empirically confirm the statements of Section 3.3, by showing that one can recover the 2-D grid structure via second order statistics. In [3, 12] the authors estimate similarities between features to construct locally connected networks.
items.zh: 与本工作相关的另一条工作线是从数据中发现网格拓扑。在 [19] 中，作者通过显示可以通过二阶统计量恢复二维网格结构，实证地证实了第 3.3 节的陈述。在 [3, 12] 中，作者估计特征之间的相似性以构建局部连接网络。

items.en: We could improve both constructions, and to some extent unify them, with a multiscale clustering of the graph that plays nicely with the Laplacian. As mentioned before, in the case of the grid, the standard dyadic cubes have the property that subsampling the Fourier functions on the grid to a coarser grid is the same as finding the Fourier functions on the coarser grid. This property would eliminate the annoying necessity of mapping the spectral construction to the finest grid at each layer to do the nonlinearity; and would allow us to interpret (via interpolation) the local filters at deeper layers in the spatial construction to be low frequency.
items.zh: 我们可以改进这两种构造，并在一定程度上统一它们，通过使用与拉普拉斯矩阵良好配合的多尺度图聚类。如前所述，在网格的情况下，标准二进立方体具有这样的性质：将网格上的傅里叶函数子采样到更粗的网格等同于在更粗的网格上找到傅里叶函数。这个性质将消除在每个层将频谱构造映射到最细网格以进行非线性的烦人必要性；并且将允许我们（通过插值）将空间构造中更深层的局部滤波器解释为低频的。

items.en: This kind of clustering is the underpinning of the multigrid method for solving discretized PDE’s (and linear systems in general) [24]. There have been several papers extending the multigrid method, and in particular, the multiscale clustering(s) associated to the multigrid method, in settings more general than regular grids, see for example [16, 15] for situations as in this paper, and see [24] for the algebraic multigrid method in general. In this work, for simplicity, we use a naive multiscale clustering on the space side construction that is not guaranteed to respect the original graph’s Laplacian, and no explicit spatial clustering in the spectral construction.
items.zh: 这种聚类是用于求解离散化 PDE（以及一般线性系统）的多重网格方法的基础 [24]。已有几篇论文将多重网格方法，特别是与多重网格方法相关的多尺度聚类，推广到比规则网格更一般的设置，例如 [16, 15] 针对本文中的情况，以及 [24] 针对一般的代数多重网格方法。在本工作中，为简单起见，我们在空间侧构造中使用了一种朴素的多尺度聚类，该聚类不能保证尊重原始图的拉普拉斯矩阵，并且在频谱构造中没有显式的空间聚类。

items.en: The previous constructions are tested on two variations of the MNIST data set. In the first, we subsample the normal 28×28282828\times 28 grid to get 400400400 coordinates. These coordinates still have a 222-D structure, but it is not possible to use standard convolutions. We then make a dataset by placing d=4096𝑑4096d=4096 points on the 333-D unit sphere and project random MNIST images onto this set of points, as described in Section 5.2.
items.zh: 前面的构造在 MNIST 数据集的两种变体上进行了测试。在第一种中，我们对正常的 28×28 网格进行子采样，得到 400 个坐标。这些坐标仍然具有二维结构，但无法使用标准卷积。然后，我们通过将 d=4096 个点放置在三维单位球面上，并将随机 MNIST 图像投影到这组点上，制作了一个数据集，如第 5.2 节所述。

items.en: In all the experiments, we use Rectified Linear Units as nonlinearities and max-pooling. We train the models with cross-entropy loss, using a fixed learning rate of 0.10.10.1 with momentum 0.90.90.9.
items.zh: 在所有实验中，我们使用修正线性单元作为非线性函数和最大池化。我们使用交叉熵损失训练模型，固定学习率为 0.1，动量为 0.9。

items.en: We first apply the constructions from sections 3.2 and 2.3 to the subsampled MNIST dataset. Figure 3 shows examples of the resulting input signals, and Figures 4, 5 show the hierarchical clustering constructed from the graph and some eigenfunctions of the graph Laplacian, respectively. The performance of various graph architectures is reported in Table 1. To serve as a baseline, we compute the standard Nearest Neighbor classifier, which performs slightly worse than in the full MNIST dataset (2.8%percent2.82.8\%). A two-layer Fully Connected neural network reduces the error to 1.8%percent1.81.8\%. The geometrical structure of the data can be exploited with the CNN graph architectures. Local Receptive Fields adapted to the graph structure outperform the fully connected network. In particular, two layers of filtering and max-pooling define a network which efficiently aggregates information to the final classifier. The spectral construction performs slightly worse on this dataset. We considered a frequency cutoff of N/2=200𝑁2200N/2=200. However, the frequency smoothing architecture described in section 3.4, which contains the smallest number of parameters, outperforms the regular spectral construction.
items.zh: 我们首先将第3.2节和第2.3节的构造应用于子采样的MNIST数据集。图3展示了所得输入信号的示例，图4和图5分别展示了从图构建的层次聚类和图拉普拉斯算子的某些特征函数。各种图架构的性能报告在表1中。作为基线，我们计算了标准最近邻分类器，其性能略低于完整MNIST数据集（2.8%）。两层全连接神经网络将误差降低到1.8%。数据的几何结构可以通过CNN图架构加以利用。适应图结构的局部感受野优于全连接网络。特别是，两层滤波和最大池化定义了一个有效聚合信息到最终分类器的网络。谱构造在此数据集上表现略差。我们考虑了频率截止N/2=200。然而，第3.4节描述的频率平滑架构参数数量最少，却优于常规谱构造。

items.en: These results can be interpreted as follows. MNIST digits are characterized by localized oriented strokes, which require measurements with good spatial localization. Locally receptive fields are constructed to explicitly satisfy this constraint, whereas in the spectral construction the measurements are not enforced to become spatially localized. Adding the smoothness constraint on the spectrum of the filters improves classification results, since the filters are enforced to have better spatial localization.
items.zh: 这些结果可以解释如下。MNIST数字以局部定向笔画为特征，这需要具有良好空间定位的测量。局部感受野被构造为显式满足这一约束，而在谱构造中，测量并未被强制实现空间定位。在滤波器频谱上添加平滑约束改善了分类结果，因为滤波器被强制具有更好的空间定位。

items.en: This fact is illustrated in Figure 6. We verify that Locally Receptive fields encode different templates across different spatial neighborhoods, since there is no global strucutre tying them together. On the other hand, spectral constructions have the capacity to generate local measurements that generalize across the graph. When the spectral multipliers are not constrained, the resulting filters tend to be spatially delocalized, as shown in panels (c)-(d). This corresponds to the fundamental limitation of Fourier analysis to encode local phenomena. However, we observe in panels (e)-(f) that a simple smoothing across the spectrum of the graph Laplacian restores some form of spatial localization and creates filters which generalize across different spatial positions, as should be expected for convolution operators.
items.zh: 这一事实在图6中得到了说明。我们验证了局部感受野在不同空间邻域编码不同的模板，因为没有全局结构将它们联系在一起。另一方面，谱构造有能力生成跨图泛化的局部测量。当谱乘子不受约束时，所得滤波器倾向于空间离域，如图(c)-(d)所示。这对应于傅里叶分析在编码局部现象方面的基本局限性。然而，我们在图(e)-(f)中观察到，在图拉普拉斯算子频谱上的简单平滑恢复了一定形式的空间定位，并创建了跨不同空间位置泛化的滤波器，正如卷积算子所预期的那样。

items.en: We test in this section the graph CNN constructions on another low-dimensional graph. In this case, we lift the MNIST digits to the sphere. The dataset is constructed as follows. We first sample 409640964096 random points S={sj}j≤4096𝑆subscriptsubscript𝑠𝑗𝑗4096S=\{s_{j}\}_{j\leq 4096} from the unit sphere S2⊂ℝ3superscript𝑆2superscriptℝ3S^{2}\subset\mathbb{R}^{3}. We then consider an orthogonal basis 𝐄=(e1,e2,e3)𝐄subscript𝑒1subscript𝑒2subscript𝑒3{\bf E}=(e_{1},e_{2},e_{3}) of ℝ3superscriptℝ3\mathbb{R}^{3} with ‖e1‖=1,‖e2‖=2,‖e3‖=3formulae-sequencenormsubscript𝑒11formulae-sequencenormsubscript𝑒22normsubscript𝑒33\|e_{1}\|=1\,,\,\|e_{2}\|=2\,,\,\|e_{3}\|=3 and a random covariance operator Σ=(𝐄+W)T​(𝐄+W)Σsuperscript𝐄𝑊𝑇𝐄𝑊\Sigma=({\bf E}+W)^{T}({\bf E}+W), where W𝑊W is a Gaussian iid matrix with variance σ2<1superscript𝜎21\sigma^{2}<1. For each signal xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} from the original MNIST dataset, we sample a covariance operator ΣisubscriptΣ𝑖\Sigma_{i} from the former distribution and consider its PCA basis Uisubscript𝑈𝑖U_{i}. This basis defines a point of view and in-plane rotation which we use to project xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} onto S𝑆S using bicubic interpolation. Figure 7 shows examples of the resulting projected digits. Since the digits ‘6’ and ‘9’ are equivalent modulo rotations, we remove the ‘9’ from the dataset. Figure 8 shows two eigenvectors of the graph Laplacian.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们在另一个低维图上测试图CNN构造。在这种情况下，我们将MNIST数字提升到球面上。数据集构造如下。我们首先从单位球面S²⊂ℝ³中采样4096个随机点S={s_j}_{j≤4096}。然后考虑ℝ³的一个正交基E=(e1,e2,e3)，其中||e1||=1, ||e2||=2, ||e3||=3，以及一个随机协方差算子Σ=(E+W)^T(E+W)，其中W是方差σ²<1的高斯独立同分布矩阵。对于原始MNIST数据集中的每个信号x_i，我们从上述分布中采样一个协方差算子Σ_i，并考虑其PCA基U_i。该基定义了一个视角和平面内旋转，我们使用双三次插值将x_i投影到S上。图7展示了所得投影数字的示例。由于数字'6'和'9'在旋转下等价，我们从数据集中移除'9'。图8展示了图拉普拉斯算子的两个特征向量。

items.en: We first consider “mild” rotations with σ2=0.2superscript𝜎20.2\sigma^{2}=0.2. The effect of such rotations is however not negligible. Indeed, table 2 shows that the Nearest Neighbor classifer performs considerably worse than in the previous example. All the neural network architectures we considered significatively improve over this basic classifier. Furthermore, we observe that both convolutional constructions match the fully connected constructions with far less parameters (but in this case, do not improve its performance). Figure 9 displays the filters learnt using different constructions. Again, we verify that the smooth spectral construction consistently improves the performance, and learns spatially localized filters, even using the naive 111-D organization of eigenvectors, which detect similar features across different locations of the graph (panels (e)-(f)).
items.zh: 我们首先考虑σ²=0.2的“温和”旋转。然而，这种旋转的影响不可忽略。事实上，表2显示最近邻分类器的性能比前一个示例差得多。我们考虑的所有神经网络架构都显著优于这个基本分类器。此外，我们观察到两种卷积构造在参数少得多的情况下匹配了全连接构造（但在这种情况下，并未提高其性能）。图9展示了使用不同构造学习的滤波器。我们再次验证了平滑谱构造持续改善性能，并学习了空间定位的滤波器，即使使用朴素的1-D特征向量组织，也能检测图不同位置上的相似特征（图(e)-(f)）。

items.en: Finally, we consider the uniform rotation case, where now the basis Uisubscript𝑈𝑖U_{i} is a random basis of ℝ3superscriptℝ3\mathbb{R}^{3}. In that case, the intra-class variability is much more severe, as seen by inspecting the performance of the Nearest neighbor classifier. All the previously described neural network architectures significantly improve over this classifier, although the performance is notably worse than in the mild rotation scenario. In this case, an efficient representation needs to be fully roto-translation invariant. Since this is a non-commutative group, it is likely that deeper architectures perform better than the models considered here.
items.zh: 最后，我们考虑均匀旋转情况，其中基U_i现在是ℝ³的随机基。在这种情况下，类内变异性更加严重，从最近邻分类器的性能可以看出。所有先前描述的神经网络架构都显著优于该分类器，尽管性能明显比温和旋转场景差。在这种情况下，有效的表示需要完全旋转-平移不变。由于这是一个非交换群，更深的架构可能比这里考虑的模型表现更好。

items.en: Using graph-based analogues of convolutional architectures can greatly reduce the number of parameters in a neural network without worsening (and often improving) the test error, while simultaneously giving a faster forward propagation. These methods can be scaled to data with a large number of coordinates that have a notion of locality.
items.zh: 使用基于图的卷积架构类比可以大幅减少神经网络中的参数数量，同时不降低（通常还会改善）测试误差，并实现更快的前向传播。这些方法可扩展到具有大量坐标且存在局部性概念的数据。

items.en: There is much to be done here. We suspect with more careful training and deeper networks we can consistently improve on fully connected networks on “manifold like” graphs like the sampled sphere. Furthermore, we intend to apply these techniques to less artifical problems, for example, on netflix like recommendation problems where there is a biclustering of the data and coordinates. Finally, the fact that smoothness on the naive ordering of the eigenvectors leads to improved results and localized filters suggests that it may be possible to make “dual” constructions with O​(1)𝑂1O(1) parameters per filter in much more generality than the grid.
items.zh: 这方面还有很多工作要做。我们推测，通过更仔细的训练和更深的网络，可以在类似流形的图（如采样球面）上持续改进全连接网络。此外，我们计划将这些技术应用于更非人造的问题，例如类似 Netflix 的推荐问题（其中数据和坐标存在双聚类）。最后，特征向量朴素排序上的平滑性可带来改进结果和局部化滤波器这一事实表明，在比网格更一般的场景中，可能可以构建每个滤波器仅含 O(1) 个参数的“对偶”结构。
